title: lyonia santiagoana
intro: Lyonia santiagoana, also known as Santiago lyonia or mountain lyonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is valued for its ability to treat various health issues, such as fever, cold, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, and its leaves can be used to make a tincture, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
